sections.paragraph:
Original: תּנשׁמת

Transliteration: tanshemeth

Phonetic: tan-sheh'-meth

BDB Definition:

  1. an unclean animal of some kind
    1. an unclean bird
      1. perhaps the ibis, water-hen, species of owl, barn owl
    2. an unclean lizard
      1. perhaps the chameleon
    3. perhaps an extinct lizard or bird, exact meaning unknown

Origin: from H5395

TWOT entry: 1433b

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
